detail: Math power analysis (orchestrator-verified): forward-event confirmatory of QRB-6 is SEVERELY UNDERPOWERED. Per-event Sharpe ~0.085; 80% power needs 852 events/28yr (full effect) or 7671/256yr (1/3 haircut); 50% (coin-flip reject) needs 373 events/12yr. The 2030 look (n=120) has only 9-24% power -> near-certain fail-to-reject = a KILL of a possibly-real signal. QRB-6 is a modest-Sharpe (~0.47 annual) low-freq edge: real in 16yr history, infeasible to confirm out-of-sample on a sub-decade horizon. WAVE PAUSED before NHT/PR — design needs a CEO decision (freeze-low-power / long-horizon / abandon-and-winddown / amend-decision-map). Not freezing a near-futile test.

CEO: route the wind-down for ratification. QRB-6 confirmatory NOT frozen (infeasible power: 9-24% at the 2030 look). Proposed: wind down QRB-6 (exploratory AMBIGUOUS = terminal verdict), retire trial 53981a4a as withdrawn-pre-freeze (no data examined -> must not inflate deflation denominator), bank the confirmability lesson. HoQR (strategy-kill) + NHT (honesty check) ratify; PM consensus; quorum.

detail: A 7-char PREFIX of the Saxo key (not a usable credential; no full key/token/auth material) was written by the orchestrator into a prior log note (the false-positive adjudication, ironically) and pushed to origin/main at f61027c. Working-tree line redacted. TWO real defects: (1) orchestrator should NEVER write any part of the key into a log/note even when describing the scan regex; (2) the orchestrator's push-range secret-scan PRINTED the real hit but did not HALT the push (the assert only verified the positive control, not that real-hits was empty) -- the guard is advisory-print, must be blocking. CEO posture on Saxo (memory): relaxed (tokens 24h TTL, warn-once); but this is key-prefix material, surfaced for a force-push-scrub decision. Going forward: refer to 'the Saxo-key-prefix pattern', never the literal chars.

History rewrite + force-push COMPLETE (CEO-authorized). filter-branch redacted the Saxo-key 7-char prefix across the 3 affected commits; origin/main force-updated f61027c->d7cda44; new branch history verified CLEAN. Caveat surfaced to CEO: GitHub may retain the orphaned old commits accessible by direct SHA until its internal GC; for a non-usable 7-char PREFIX (not a credential) this is acceptable. Process fixes adopted: (1) NEVER write any part of a key into logs/notes (even describing the scan regex) -- refer to 'the Saxo-key-prefix pattern'; (2) the orchestrator push-scan now HALTS on real hits (assert not real), was advisory-print-only.
